values.resource.air.title: Suit Air
values.resource.air.description: Breathable air remaining in the spacesuit system.
values.action.inspect-other-cryopods.title: Inspect the Other Cryopods
values.action.inspect-other-cryopods.descriptio: Check the remaining pods for occupants, records, or usable equipment.
values.action.inspect-other-cryopods.success: The other lids stand open. Their restraints retain human-shaped pressure marks, but the shells contain only brittle sensor leads and a film of gray dust.
values.action.inspect-other-cryopods.failure: Clouded windows and dead displays conceal whatever remains inside the other pods.
values.action.put-on-space-suit.title: Put On the Spacesuit
values.action.put-on-space-suit.description: Seal the utility suit and start its air system.
values.action.put-on-space-suit.success: The neck ring locks after two attempts. The suit stiffens under pressure, and its air gauge climbs to full.
values.action.put-on-space-suit.failure: The neck seal folds beneath the locking ring. The suit refuses to pressurize.
values.action.open-cryobay-airlock.title: Open the Airlock
values.action.open-cryobay-airlock.description: Cycle the inner door and expose the cryobay to vacuum.
values.action.open-cryobay-airlock.success: The damaged valves open together. Vapor tears across the deck, the room falls silent, and the airlock indicator turns green.
values.action.open-cryobay-airlock.failure: The valves shudder without opening. The inner door remains sealed.

privateNotes: Added the player's requested inspection of the other cryopods and records its discovery as state. Suiting up establishes the air reserve needed for the hazardous airlock route.
